expected_effect: Recover low-retail and low-volatility edge by clearing stale rich-cheap carry after genuine quiet re-convergence without broad active-state fee cuts.
rationale: The current line fixes stale latent anchoring, but stored divergence can still linger after the anchor has re-converged. Relax divergence memory only after quiet recentering and bias the effect toward longer quiet gaps.
title: Quiet divergence relaxation
